data.content: Planning complete. Repro is confirmed in /home/cartine/foolery: foolery-e8a2 is shipped and same-day, show/cold search find it, list paths omit it. Root cause is sync apply resolving terminal true directly to Cold, bypassing the 72 hour recent-terminal grace in tiering.rs. Implement a terminal-flag-aware age classifier, add sync and CLI regressions for recent terminal list visibility, preserve stale terminal cold routing, and add a doctor --fix repair for recent_terminal_cold rows so existing misclassified caches can recover.
